meta.title: FrankyShop — Houseware made for everyday Tanzanian homes
meta.description: Thermos, cutlery and dishes — picked for quality, priced for everyone. Trusted houseware from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam. Pay with M-Pesa or card.

hero.subtitle: Thermos, cutlery and dishes — chosen piece by piece for the way Tanzanian families actually cook, eat and host.

categories.thermos_caption: Keep it hot. Keep it cold.
categories.dishes_caption: Steel that earns its place at the table.

sections.shop_by_category_title: Built for the kitchens we cook in.
sections.featured_title: What we'd put in our own home.

editorial.title: From Kariakoo to your kitchen.
editorial.body_1: Franky has been part of Kariakoo for years — the kind of shop you walk into for one thing and leave with a story. We carry only what we'd use ourselves: pieces with weight, finishes that don't peel, lids that close properly the hundredth time.
editorial.body_2: Now you can shop the same shelves from your phone, with M-Pesa, and have it brought to your door across Dar es Salaam.

language_popup.title: Welcome to Franky.
language_popup.subtitle: Pick your language to continue. You can change it any time.

footer.tagline: Quality houseware for the way Tanzanian homes actually live — picked in Kariakoo, delivered across Dar.
